data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Name
data.value: Tax-Free Childcare

data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Description
data.value: Up to £2,000 a year towards childcare costs or £4,000 if your child is disabled

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Name
data.value: Universal Credit childcare

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Description
data.value: Claim back up to £1,071 of childcare costs a month (or £1,836 for 2 or more children)

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Name
data.value: Free Childcare for Working Parents

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Description
data.value: 30 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Name
data.value: Early learning for 2-year-olds

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Description
data.value: 15 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Name
data.value: 15 hours free childcare for 3 and 4-year-olds

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Description
data.value: 15 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: WhenToApply_AskProviderOrCouncil
data.value: Ask your childcare provider or local council

data.name: WhenToApply_Now
data.value: Now

data.name: WhenToApply_WhenBorn
data.value: When they are born

data.name: WhenToApply_WhenTwentyThreeWeeksOld
data.value: When they are 23 weeks old

data.name: WhenToApply_FromDate
data.value: From {0:dd MMM yyyy}

data.name: WhenToApply_TaxFreeChildcare_UserParentalLeave
data.value: The date you return from parental leave affects when you can apply

data.name: WhenToApply_TaxFreeChildcare_PartnerParentalLeave
data.value: The date your partner returns from parental leave affects when you can apply

data.name: WhenToApply_TaxFreeChildcare_UserAndPartnerParentalLeave
data.value: The date you and your partner return from parental leave affects when you can apply

data.name: WhenToApply_ThirtyHours_UserParentalLeave
data.value: The date you return from parental leave affects when you can apply

data.name: WhenToApply_ThirtyHours_PartnerParentalLeave
data.value: The date your partner returns from parental leave affects when you can apply

data.name: WhenToApply_ThirtyHours_UserAndPartnerParentalLeave
data.value: The date you and your partner return from parental leave affects when you can apply
